---
title: "test_forge_gungnir_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_forge_gungnir_empire.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.38
---

## Intent
The `test_forge_gungnir_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestForgeGungnirCalculus, gungnir, test_forge_detects_claustrophobic_python, test_forge_detects_top_heavy_python, test_forge_detects_ugly_react, test_forge_passes_beautiful_code, test_forge_passes_symmetric_react. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestForgeGungnirCalculus, gungnir, test_forge_detects_claustrophobic_python, test_forge_detects_top_heavy_python, test_forge_detects_ugly_react, test_forge_passes_beautiful_code, test_forge_passes_symmetric_react. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.gungnir.universal](file://src.core.engine.gungnir.universal)

### Exports
- `TestForgeGungnirCalculus`
- `gungnir`
- `test_forge_detects_claustrophobic_python`
- `test_forge_detects_top_heavy_python`
- `test_forge_detects_ugly_react`
- `test_forge_passes_beautiful_code`
- `test_forge_passes_symmetric_react`
